zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD报79.49，24小时涨幅仅0.03%，价格维持窄幅震荡格局。现价低于20日均线81.22，显示短期趋势仍偏空，市场动能不足，多头尚未有效夺回关键均线压制，整体处于整理阶段。

从技术指标观察，MACD值为-0.683，处于零轴下方，表明空头动能仍占据一定优势。不过价格跌幅有限且波动收窄，显示空头力量有所减弱。由于RSI数据缺失，短线超买超卖状态暂无法进一步确认。

关键支撑位关注78.97附近的日内低点区域，若跌破该位置，可能进一步测试78.00甚至76.50支撑。上方首要阻力位位于80.00整数关口，其后为20日均线81.22附近，突破后有望打开向83.00区域反弹空间。

交易策略方面，激进交易者可关注78.90至79.00区域的支撑表现，企稳后尝试短线做多，目标80.50至81.20。稳健投资者则建议等待价格重新站上20日均线并确认放量突破后再跟进，以降低震荡行情中的交易风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading in a relatively compressed range near 79.49, reflecting short-term indecision after failing to reclaim momentum above the 20-day moving average at 81.22. Price action remains mildly bearish because the market continues to trade below that SMA, suggesting sellers still control the broader near-term structure. The narrow intraday range between 78.97 and 79.63 also signals reduced volatility, often a precursor to a stronger directional move once support or resistance gives way.

Momentum indicators lean cautious despite the flat 24-hour performance. The MACD reading at -0.683 shows bearish momentum remains active, even without a confirmed signal line reading. This suggests downside pressure has not fully faded, although the pace of selling appears moderate rather than aggressive. RSI data is unavailable, limiting confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, but current positioning below the moving average keeps sentiment tilted slightly defensive in the short term.

Key support is developing around 78.90, with a stronger defensive zone near 77.50 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance appears near 80.00, followed by the more important technical barrier around the SMA region at 81.20–81.50. A sustained breakout above that zone could shift momentum back toward buyers and open room for a move toward 83.00. Failure to hold above current levels, however, may encourage additional consolidation or another test of lower support.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious range-trading approach until clearer momentum emerges. Buying near support with tight risk controls below 77.50 could offer favorable positioning if price stabilizes. More conservative participants may wait for confirmation above 81.20 before entering long exposure. Bearish setups become more attractive only if SOL/USD decisively breaks beneath 78.90 with increasing volume, which would strengthen the probability of extended downside continuation.
